name: investiq
description: Fresh-data investment research agent team for discovery, selection, entry, and exit decisions.

interface.longDescription: investiq helps agents produce source-grounded investment research reports for opportunity discovery, asset selection, entry analysis, and exit analysis. It requires fresh web data, provenance, risk review, and human final decision-making.
defaultPrompt: investiq discover: find current investment opportunities
investiq entry: analyze whether a target is buyable now
investiq exit: review sell and stop-loss conditions
